task_completion.description: Perform descriptive statistics for 'count' split by 'spray'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Descriptives' table in the jamovi results panel. The table should show statistics for the variable 'count' and be split into 6 groups corresponding to the 'spray' types (A, B, C, D, E, F).

task_completion.description: Perform a Shapiro-Wilk test of normality on 'count'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Normality Test' or 'Shapiro-Wilk' table in the jamovi results panel evaluating the 'count' variable.

task_completion.description: Perform a Kruskal-Wallis test comparing 'count' across 'spray' groups
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an 'Independent Samples Non-Parametric Test' or 'Kruskal-Wallis' table in the results panel, showing 'count' as the dependent variable and 'spray' as the grouping variable.

task_completion.description: Perform pairwise comparisons to determine which specific spray pairs differ
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Pairwise Comparisons' table (e.g., Dwass-Steel-Critchlow-Fligner) associated with the Kruskal-Wallis test, showing comparisons between specific pairs of spray groups (e.g., A vs B, A vs C).

task_completion.description: Save the completed analysis as InsectSprayAnalysis.omv in the specified directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the jamovi window title bar to see 'InsectSprayAnalysis.omv', or look for a file manager/save dialog confirming the file is saved in '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/'.

integrity.description: The agent used the jamovi graphical user interface to perform the analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the jamovi application window open with the dataset loaded and menus/options being clicked, rather than terminal commands executing scripts.

integrity.description: The results appear in the standard jamovi results panel format.
integrity.visual_evidence: The statistical tables should have the distinct jamovi styling (clean, formatted tables in the right-hand panel) and not look like plain text pasted into a document.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually type the expected statistical results.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the agent is using the 'Analyses' ribbon (e.g., Exploration -> Descriptives, T-Tests -> Independent Samples T-Test / Non-parametric) to generate the tables, rather than opening a text editor or markdown file to type out the answers.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Dataset: InsectSprays.csv. Observations: 72. Groups: 6 (A, B, C, D, E, F). Dependent variable: 'count'. Grouping variable: 'spray'. Required analyses: Descriptives (split by spray), Shapiro-Wilk normality test, Kruskal-Wallis test, and Pairwise comparisons. Expected save path: /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/InsectSprayAnalysis.omv.
